content-research-writer.description: Content Research Writer 是一个内容写作协作技能，充当你的写作伙伴，帮助你进行调研、大纲构建、草稿撰写和内容优化，同时保持你独特的写作风格和声音。
content-research-writer.description_en: Content Research Writer is a collaborative writing skill that acts as your writing partner, helping you with research, outlining, drafting, and content optimization while preserving your unique writing style and voice.

deep-research.description: Deep Research 是一个自主多步骤研究技能，利用 Google Gemini Deep Research Agent 执行深度调研任务。与标准 LLM 查询的即时回复不同，Deep Research 是一个"分析师盒子"，能够自主...
deep-research.description_en: Deep Research is an autonomous multi-step research skill that leverages Google Gemini Deep Research Agent for in-depth research tasks. Unlike instant LLM query responses, it acts as an "analyst box" capable of autonomous deep investigation.

humanizer-zh.description: Humanizer-zh 是一个专门针对中文语境优化的文案编辑技能，旨在识别并消除文本中明显的 AI 生成痕迹。它基于维基百科的'AI 写作迹象'综合指南，并针对中文写作习惯进行了深度适配，让 AI 生成的文字听起来更自然、更具人性的温度。
humanizer-zh.description_en: Humanizer-zh is a copywriting skill optimized for Chinese context, designed to identify and remove obvious AI-generated traces in text. Based on Wikipedia's comprehensive guide on AI writing signals, it is deeply adapted to Chinese writing habits to make AI-generated text sound more natural and human.

reports-summary.description: Reports Summary 是一个专业的周报汇总助手技能，能够从零散的员工周报中提取关键信息，生成结构清晰的汇总报告，并支持转换为 Word 文档。
reports-summary.description_en: Reports Summary is a professional weekly report aggregation skill that extracts key information from scattered employee reports, generates well-structured summary reports, and supports conversion to Word documents.

skill-market.description: Skill Market 是一个自动化的技能发现与安装技能，允许 AI Agent 从 [AgentUse Skill Market](https://www.zerone.market) 查找、浏览并安装全新的技能。
skill-market.description_en: Skill Market is an automated skill discovery and installation skill that allows AI Agents to find, browse, and install new skills from the AgentUse Skill Market.

video-summarizer.description: Video Summarizer 是一个视频内容提取与结构化总结技能，能够下载视频、转录语音、生成结构化摘要，并将结果保存为 Obsidian 笔记。
video-summarizer.description_en: Video Summarizer is a video content extraction and structured summarization skill that can download videos, transcribe speech, generate structured summaries, and save results as Obsidian notes.

weekly-report.description: Weekly Report 是一个个人周报生成助手技能，能够将零散的工作记录整理成结构清晰的规范周报，并支持转换为 Word 文档。
weekly-report.description_en: Weekly Report is a personal weekly report generation skill that organizes scattered work records into well-structured standard weekly reports, with support for conversion to Word documents.

agent-browser.description: Agent Browser 是一个基于 Rust 的高性能无头浏览器自动化 CLI 工具，支持 Node.js 备选方案。它允许 AI Agent 通过结构化的命令行指令进行网页导航、点击、输入及快照获取。
agent-browser.description_en: Agent Browser is a high-performance headless browser automation CLI built in Rust, with a Node.js alternative. It enables AI Agents to navigate, click, type, and capture snapshots through structured command-line instructions.

anti-distill.description: Anti-Distill (反蒸馏 Skill) 是一款专为保护员工核心知识资产设计的工具，能"清洗"你被迫写出的工作 Skill，在保证文档形式完整专业的同时，抽走真正核心不可替代的经验内容留给自己。
anti-distill.description_en: Anti-Distill is a tool designed to protect employees' core knowledge assets. It can "clean" work skills you were forced to write, preserving professional document formatting while stripping away the truly irreplaceable core experience for yourself.

brainstorming.description: Superpowers Brainstorming 是一个用于 AI 协助头脑风暴与创意生成的技能。
brainstorming.description_en: Superpowers Brainstorming is a skill for AI-assisted brainstorming and idea generation.

dispatching-parallel-agents.description: Superpowers Dispatching Parallel Agents 是一个用于并行调度多个子 agent 执行任务的技能。
dispatching-parallel-agents.description_en: Superpowers Dispatching Parallel Agents is a skill for dispatching parallel subagents to execute tasks.

executing-plans.description: Superpowers Executing Plans 是一个用于按计划执行任务与过程的技能。
executing-plans.description_en: Superpowers Executing Plans is a skill for executing tasks and workflows according to a plan.

finishing-a-development-branch.description: Superpowers Finishing a Development Branch 是一个用于完成开发分支并整合变更的技能。
finishing-a-development-branch.description_en: Superpowers Finishing a Development Branch is a skill for finishing a development branch and integrating changes.

receiving-code-review.description: Superpowers Receiving Code Review 是一个用于接收和处理代码评审反馈的技能。
receiving-code-review.description_en: Superpowers Receiving Code Review is a skill for receiving and handling code review feedback.

requesting-code-review.description: Superpowers Requesting Code Review 是一个用于请求代码审查并准备提交的技能。
requesting-code-review.description_en: Superpowers Requesting Code Review is a skill for requesting code review and preparing submissions.

subagent-driven-development.description: Superpowers Subagent Driven Development 是一个用于构建由子 agent 驱动的开发流程的技能。
subagent-driven-development.description_en: Superpowers Subagent Driven Development is a skill for building subagent-driven development workflows.

systematic-debugging.description: Superpowers Systematic Debugging 是一个用于系统性调试与问题定位的技能。
systematic-debugging.description_en: Superpowers Systematic Debugging is a skill for systematic debugging and problem diagnosis.

test-driven-development.description: Superpowers Test Driven Development 是一个用于测试驱动开发流程的技能。
test-driven-development.description_en: Superpowers Test Driven Development is a skill for test-driven development workflows.

using-git-worktrees.description: Superpowers Using Git Worktrees 是一个用于使用 Git worktree 管理多分支开发的技能。
using-git-worktrees.description_en: Superpowers Using Git Worktrees is a skill for managing multi-branch development with Git worktrees.

using-superpowers.description: Superpowers Using Superpowers 是一个用于教你如何高效使用 Superpowers 的技能。
using-superpowers.description_en: Superpowers Using Superpowers is a skill that teaches you how to use Superpowers effectively.

verification-before-completion.description: Superpowers Verification Before Completion 是一个用于完成前验证结果与质量的技能。
verification-before-completion.description_en: Superpowers Verification Before Completion is a skill for verifying results and quality before completion.

writing-plans.description: Superpowers Writing Plans 是一个用于构建开发或执行计划的技能。
writing-plans.description_en: Superpowers Writing Plans is a skill for building development or execution plans.

writing-skills.description: Superpowers Writing Skills 是一个用于生成技能文档与技能描述的技能。
writing-skills.description_en: Superpowers Writing Skills is a skill for generating skill documentation and descriptions.

baoyu-article-illustrator.description: Baoyu Article Illustrator 是一个用于自动生成图文搭配插画的内容创作技能。
baoyu-article-illustrator.description_en: Baoyu Article Illustrator is a content creation skill for automatically generating illustrated article visuals.

baoyu-comic.description: Baoyu Comic 是一个用于创建漫画风格图文内容的技能。
baoyu-comic.description_en: Baoyu Comic is a skill for generating comic-style illustrated content.

baoyu-cover-image.description: Baoyu Cover Image 是一个用于生成封面图和视觉海报的技能。
baoyu-cover-image.description_en: Baoyu Cover Image is a skill for generating cover images and visual posters.

baoyu-diagram.description: Baoyu Diagram 是一个用于生成流程图与示意图的技能。
baoyu-diagram.description_en: Baoyu Diagram is a skill for generating flowcharts and diagrams.

baoyu-format-markdown.description: Baoyu Format Markdown 是一个用于格式化和美化 Markdown 文档的技能。
baoyu-format-markdown.description_en: Baoyu Format Markdown is a skill for formatting and beautifying Markdown documents.

baoyu-infographic.description: Baoyu Infographic 是一个用于生成信息图与数据可视化布局的技能。
baoyu-infographic.description_en: Baoyu Infographic is a skill for generating infographics and data visualization layouts.

baoyu-markdown-to-html.description: Baoyu Markdown to HTML 是一个用于将 Markdown 转换为 HTML 的技能。
baoyu-markdown-to-html.description_en: Baoyu Markdown to HTML is a skill for converting Markdown into HTML.

baoyu-slide-deck.description: Baoyu Slide Deck 是一个用于生成演示幻灯片的技能。
baoyu-slide-deck.description_en: Baoyu Slide Deck is a skill for generating presentation slide decks.

baoyu-translate.description: Baoyu Translate 是一个用于文本翻译与多语言处理的技能。
baoyu-translate.description_en: Baoyu Translate is a skill for text translation and multilingual processing.

baoyu-url-to-markdown.description: Baoyu URL to Markdown 是一个用于将网页链接内容转换为 Markdown 的技能。
baoyu-url-to-markdown.description_en: Baoyu URL to Markdown is a skill for converting web links into Markdown.

baoyu-xhs-images.description: Baoyu XHS Images 是一个用于生成和管理小红书图像内容的技能。
baoyu-xhs-images.description_en: Baoyu XHS Images is a skill for generating and managing Xiaohongshu image content.

baoyu-youtube-transcript.description: Baoyu YouTube Transcript 是一个用于下载和转录 YouTube 视频字幕的技能。
baoyu-youtube-transcript.description_en: Baoyu YouTube Transcript is a skill for downloading and transcribing YouTube video subtitles.

colleague-skill.description: Colleague Skill 是一个将同事"蒸馏"为 AI Skill 的工具，通过自动采集飞书/钉钉数据，生成包含工作能力和性格特征的数字化同事。
colleague-skill.description_en: Colleague Skill is a tool that "distills" colleagues into AI Skills by automatically collecting Feishu/DingTalk data to generate digital colleague profiles with work capabilities and personality traits.

huashu-design.description: Huashu Design 是一个 HTML 原生的 AI 设计技能，让 AI agent 用一句话产出可交付的高保真设计——交互原型、演讲幻灯片、时间轴动画、信息图，全部基于 HTML 构建，支持导出 MP4/GIF/PPTX/PDF。
huashu-design.description_en: Huashu Design is an HTML-native AI design skill that lets AI agents produce deliverable high-fidelity designs from a single sentence — interactive prototypes, presentation slides, timeline animations, infographics — all built with HTML and exportable to MP4/GIF/PPTX/PDF.

ljg-learn.description: LJG Learn 是一个深度概念解剖技能，通过 8 个探索维度拆解任意概念，把复杂思想压缩成可执行的洞察。
ljg-learn.description_en: LJG Learn is a deep concept dissection skill that deconstructs any concept through eight exploration dimensions and compresses insights into actionable epiphanies.

ljg-rank.description: LJG Rank 是一个领域降秩技能，将纷繁现象砍到不可再少的独立生成力，再用它们把现象一个个生回来。
ljg-rank.description_en: LJG Rank is a domain rank-reduction skill that trims noisy phenomena down to irreducible generators and uses them to reconstruct each phenomenon.

ljg-roundtable.description: LJG Roundtable 是一个圆桌对谈技能，让多个思想角色围绕一个问题交锋，把复杂议题摊成多面镜子。
ljg-roundtable.description_en: LJG Roundtable is a roundtable conversation skill that lets multiple intellectual personas clash around a question, unfolding complex issues through many mirrors.

ljg-think.description: LJG Think 是一个追本之箭式的纵向深钻思维技能，像箭一样把观点、现象或问题一路钻到不可再分的本质。
ljg-think.description_en: LJG Think is a root-seeking arrow of vertical deep thinking, drilling any idea, phenomenon, or question down to its irreducible root.

ljg-writes.description: LJG Writes 是一个写作引擎技能，像手术刀一样剖开观点，层层剥到底，输出 1000-1500 字的精炼文章。
ljg-writes.description_en: LJG Writes is a writing-engine skill that dissects an idea like a scalpel, peeling it layer by layer into a 1000-1500 word refined essay.

minimax-skills.description: MiniMax Skills 是一套面向 AI 编程工具的综合技能库，提供结构化的、生产级质量的前端、全栈、移动端（Android、iOS、Flutter、React Native）、着色器开发以及文档处理（PDF、PPTX、XLSX、DO...
minimax-skills.description_en: MiniMax Skills is a comprehensive skill library for AI coding tools, providing structured, production-quality skills for frontend, full-stack, mobile (Android, iOS, Flutter, React Native), shader development, and document processing (PDF, PPTX, XLSX, DOCX).

obsidian-cli.description: Obsidian Skills 是一套专为 Obsidian 知识管理工具设计的 Agent Skills，遵循 [Agent Skills 规范](https://agentskills.io/specification)，可与 Clau...
obsidian-cli.description_en: Obsidian Skills is a set of Agent Skills designed for the Obsidian knowledge management tool, following the Agent Skills specification and compatible with AI coding assistants.

opencli.description: OpenCLI 是一个将网站、浏览器会话、Electron 应用和本地工具转化为确定性接口的 CLI 工具库。它可复用已登录的浏览器状态，自动化实时工作流，并将重复操作固化为可复用的 CLI 命令。
opencli.description_en: OpenCLI is a CLI toolkit that transforms websites, browser sessions, Electron apps, and local tools into deterministic interfaces. It reuses logged-in browser states, automates real-time workflows, and solidifies repetitive operations into reusable CLI commands.

officecli.description: OfficeCLI 是一个基于 .NET 的办公自动化技能，支持 Office 文档生成、处理和转换。
officecli.description_en: OfficeCLI is a .NET-based office automation skill that supports Office document generation, processing, and conversion.

officecli-docx.description: OfficeCLI DOCX 是一个专注于 Word 文档生成与编辑的技能。
officecli-docx.description_en: OfficeCLI DOCX is a skill focused on Word document generation and editing.

officecli-xlsx.description: OfficeCLI XLSX 是一个专注于 Excel 表格生成与分析的技能。
officecli-xlsx.description_en: OfficeCLI XLSX is a skill focused on Excel spreadsheet generation and analysis.

officecli-pptx.description: OfficeCLI PPTX 是一个专注于 PowerPoint 演示文稿处理与生成的技能。
officecli-pptx.description_en: OfficeCLI PPTX is a skill focused on PowerPoint presentation processing and generation.

officecli-pitch-deck.description: OfficeCLI Pitch Deck 是一个用于生成投资提案幻灯片的技能。
officecli-pitch-deck.description_en: OfficeCLI Pitch Deck is a skill for generating investor pitch deck slides.

officecli-financial-model.description: OfficeCLI Financial Model 是一个用于构建财务模型与报表的技能。
officecli-financial-model.description_en: OfficeCLI Financial Model is a skill for building financial models and reports.

officecli-data-dashboard.description: OfficeCLI Data Dashboard 是一个用于创建数据仪表盘与可视化报告的技能。
officecli-data-dashboard.description_en: OfficeCLI Data Dashboard is a skill for creating data dashboards and visual reports.

officecli-academic-paper.description: OfficeCLI Academic Paper 是一个用于撰写学术论文与研究报告的技能。
officecli-academic-paper.description_en: OfficeCLI Academic Paper is a skill for writing academic papers and research reports.

officecli-word-form.description: OfficeCLI Word Form 是一个用于生成和处理 Word 表单的技能。
officecli-word-form.description_en: OfficeCLI Word Form is a skill for generating and processing Word forms.

morph-ppt.description: Morph PPT 是一个用于创建与变换 PowerPoint 动画效果的技能。
morph-ppt.description_en: Morph PPT is a skill for creating and transforming PowerPoint animation effects.

morph-ppt-3d.description: Morph PPT 3D 是一个用于生成 3D 动画演示效果的 PowerPoint 技能。
morph-ppt-3d.description_en: Morph PPT 3D is a PowerPoint skill for generating 3D animation presentation effects.

qiushi-skill.description: 求是 Skill 是一个 AI Agent Skills 合集,从教员思想中提炼出一条总原则和九大方法论工具,系统性地武装 AI 的大脑。不是口号,不是鸡汤,而是可操作的方法论集合。
qiushi-skill.description_en: Qiushi Skill is a collection of AI Agent Skills distilled from a guiding principle and nine methodological tools, systematically arming AI's brain. Not slogans, not platitudes, but an actionable methodology toolkit.

self-improving-agent.description: Self-Improving Agent 是一个用于捕获学习经验、错误和修正建议的技能，旨在实现 AI 智能体的持续改进。
self-improving-agent.description_en: Self-Improving Agent is a skill for capturing learning experiences, errors, and correction suggestions, aimed at enabling continuous improvement of AI agents.

skill-creator.description: Skill Creator 是 Anthropic 官方提供的技能创建与迭代优化工具，帮助用户高效地创建、测试、评估和改进AI编程技能（Skill），实现从构思到部署的完整工作流。
skill-creator.description_en: Skill Creator is the official skill creation and iterative optimization tool, helping users efficiently create, test, evaluate, and improve AI coding skills through a complete workflow from ideation to deployment.

wewrite.description: WeWrite 是一款专为微信公众号打造的全流程 AI 写作助手，从热点抓取到草稿箱推送，一句话即可完成。
wewrite.description_en: WeWrite is a full-process AI writing assistant designed for WeChat Official Accounts, completing everything from trending topic discovery to draft box publishing with a single sentence.
